title: Moves Like Jagger
why_this_song: Moves Like Jagger by Maroon 5 (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I've got them moves like Jagger
I've got them moves like Jagger (uh)
I don't need to try to control you (uh)
Look into my eyes and I'll own you
And if I share my secret
You're gonna have to keep it
So watch and learn, I won't show you twice

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "moves" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "moves" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "jagger" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "jagger" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've got them moves like Jagger
Take control, own me just for the night

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If you feel like and take me away
I'll take it from here (oh, yeah, yeah)

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Moves Like Jagger" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Moves Like Jagger" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Moves Like Jagger" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Moves Like Jagger" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
